Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Imperial Steward]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 14''' — Calder assumed the role of Imperial Steward because of the Optasia.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 20''' — Calder is the Imperial Steward.}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 4''' — The Imperial Steward expected Andel.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 6''' — Estyr is willing to pretend to follow the Imperial Steward if certain conditions are met.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 13''' — The Imperial Steward is one of the authorities Calder must navigate.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 15''' — The Imperial Steward holds authority that can be used to place people under arrest.}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 10''' — Doubt cast on the Imperial Steward can be used to pressure private clients.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 20''' — The Imperial Steward's rooms are connected to some of the Imperial Palace dungeons.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
